summary: Added deterministic summary buckets for suspicious rendered-crop dimension findings in the current output-integrity audit.

files_changed.why: Added suspicious_rendered_crop_dimension_summary with counts by image kind, counts by reason, top paper buckets, and max height/aspect-ratio candidates.
Extended the suspicious-dimension regression test to assert summary fields and deterministic candidate selection.

test_results: Initial targeted pytest run failed as expected because suspicious_rendered_crop_dimension_summary was absent.
Final targeted pytest run passed: 13 passed.
Live output-integrity audit exited 1 due to 31 suspicious dimension candidates and now includes summary buckets.
repo_hygiene_notes: The live summary report was written under this run's iteration folder.
known_risks: The summary prioritizes by dimensions and paper counts; it still requires visual inspection before repair decisions.
